hero.subtitle: We build NE3/NE4 fibre and write the software that runs it. Same stack, same crew, one portal.

services.label: Capabilities
services.title: Two disciplines.
services.subtitle: From physical infrastructure to digital transformation – we offer comprehensive solutions for the telecommunications industry.

fiber.title: Fibre, end to end.
fiber.subtitle: Fibre · Field
fiber.description: NE3 and NE4 specialist. Blown fibre, splice, quality assurance — measured in metres, closed in days, not months.

items.ne3: Regional distribution networks from KEV to HÜP
items.ne4: House connections, splicing work and ONT installation
items.tiefbau: Laying of empty pipes and cables

ne4.label: NE4 · FTTH operations
ne4.title: NE4 ready to connect homes.
ne4.intro: We support the last mile from handover preparation to final documentation: house connection, splice, activation support, and ordered evidence for technical closeout.

handover.label: Handover point
handover.text: Review of HÜP, internal route, and installation conditions before field work starts.

connection.label: FTTH connection
connection.text: House connection routing and preparation with coordinated field execution.

splice.label: Splice and ONT
splice.text: Splicing, termination, and support to prepare the service for activation.

activation.label: Technical closeout
activation.text: Documentation, checklist, and quality signals for a traceable handover.

steps.survey: We check site conditions and constraints before scheduling the installation.
steps.install: We execute the connection and interior preparation against the project documentation.
steps.splice: We splice, terminate, and verify technical signals without promising out-of-scope metrics.
steps.document: We close with evidence, field notes, and handover material for operations or billing.

signals.photos: Visual evidence of the worked location and final state.
signals.checks: Installation and review checklists before closeout.
signals.handover: Clear documentation so project, operations, and client teams share the same status.

software.title: Software, ours.
software.subtitle: Software · Native
software.description: We write the tools we use on site. Field apps, project trackers, dashboards, bots — the same stack powers our own crews and our clients.

items.bot: Appointment Bot for businesses and client acquisition

products.label: Software stack
products.title: Built on site.
products.subtitle: Every product ships first to our own crews. If it breaks on a Tuesday in Celle, it ships out Wednesday.
